programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Le monde dans tous ses Etats
programme.desc: Un décryptage, en compagnie d'un(e) invité(e), de l'actualité politique et géopolitique d'un pays, à travers des reportages, des invités et des analyses des correspondants de france.tv et France 24.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité en direct : breaking news, sujets chauds, grandes tendances culture, santé, tech et environnement, pour ne rien manquer de l'actualité.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité en direct : breaking news, sujets chauds, grandes tendances culture, santé, tech et environnement, pour ne rien manquer de l'actualité.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: E9 - Veggies Got To Dance
programme.desc: Supertato's dancing is too powerful and too destructive but when he has to face Evil Pea in a dance off to save his trapped friends he soon realises his dancing can save the day.

programme.title: E8 - The Hat Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: E9 - Betty's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: E13 - Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: E6 - Holiday
programme.desc: Captain Captain decides she needs a break from Sandy and Seaweed and books a holiday.

programme.title: E9 - Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E7 - The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E35 - Postie Plom
programme.desc: In this poptastic adventure, the friends are celebrating Valentine's Day. Plom is delivering everyone's cards, but tries to finish his deliveries in time for a big Valentine's Day game.

programme.title: E29 - Lemon Cafe
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck discover a Lemon Cafe in the park, but it seems to be nearly closing time...

programme.title: E30 - Star Renovation
programme.desc: Venus has attempted to redecorate the night sky, but now Sarah can't find any of her favourite constellations...

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E22 - Alien Television
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E30 - Star Renovation
programme.desc: Venus has attempted to redecorate the night sky, but now Sarah can't find any of her favourite constellations...

programme.title: E22 - The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E9 - Betty's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: E10 - The Choreography Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.title: E13 - Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: E20 - Sidney The Soldier
programme.desc: Krash wakes up and notices a toy that he has never seen before.

programme.title: E9 - Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E11 - Charades
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song

Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: A Closer Look At Health Trends
programme.desc: Diet breads for weight loss, magic exercises for strong muscles, secret tricks for skin and hair: Many tips on the web are ineffective, some are dangerous, but others are promising. In Good Shape has put some trends under a microscope.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Legacies: Michael Jackson, Chernobyl
programme.desc: The 1980s may seem like the distant past. But some of the decade's historical and pop cultural events were so significant that their effects are still felt today. We go beyond nostalgia to reckon with their legacies.

programme.title: Dangerous Apps - In The Web Of Data Brokers
programme.desc: What many smartphone users know: the apps on their phones collect detailed location data. What few people know: the information often ends up with a global network of data brokers and advertising companies.

programme.title: E3 - Girona
programme.desc: Jack learns how to cook the old-fashioned, classic British jellied eels dish. Although it was once an extremely popular meal in Britain, will the Spanish locals like it too?

programme.title: E6 - Cut and Dried
programme.desc: The pressure is on to find the big stones before the winter snow drives the team from the valley. A geological survey reveals there is a huge opportunity.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E6 - Restaurant Launch
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah’s new menu.

programme.title: Project Gutenberg
programme.desc: Lee Man, a member of a notorious money counterfeiting ring, is arrested in Thailand and extradited back to Hong Kong. Thanks to renowned painter Yuen Man, Lee is offered a deal by the police: Reveal the identity of Painter, the charismatic leader of the counterfeiting ring, and Yuen can bail him out. Lee has no choice but to comply and recount his story. In the 1990s, Lee and Yuen were lovers living together in Vancouver, seeking to be seen in the art world. However, success eludes them, and Lee is forced to go make counterfeit paintings to make a living. Lee's counterfeit paintings catch the eyes of Painter, and he decides to recruits Lee to join his team. Together with Painter's elite team, Lee travels the world in search of technologies to create the “Super Dollar,” a counterfeit bill that circumvents the anti-counterfeiting measures of the 1996 American dollar. But when Lee witnesses Painter's violent methods in action, he becomes desperate to escape his employer's grip..

programme.title: My Daughter is a Zombie
programme.desc: Jung-hwan, a professional wild animal trainer, spends his days bickering and playing with his teenage daughter, Soo-ah, who is passionate about dancing. Then one day, Soo-ah gets infected by a zombie virus that sweeps across the world. To protect her, Jung-hwan takes Soo-ah to Eunbong-ri, a seaside village where his mother, Bam-soon, lives. In a society determined to root out the infected, Jung-hwan notices that Soo-ah still seems to understand words, responds to her favorite songs and dances, and even flinches when scolded by Grandma Bam-soon's back scratching stick. Refusing to give up on his daughter, Jung-hwan calls on his years of animal training experience and begins the top-secret mission of training his zombie daughter...

programme.title: The Wrath of Vajra
programme.desc: When he was 8-years-old, Vajrasattva was among the children sold to the Temple of Hades. Forced by his captors to fight for food, he accidentally caused the death of his brother. He made a secret oath to take revenge. Many years pass and, as an adult, Vajrasattvah is the greatest assassin in the Temple. He escapes to China and joins the Southern Shaolin Temple where he receives spiritual enlightenment and vows to protect his own country against the Japanese. Meanwhile, the Temple of Hades have set up a branch in China. It hosts daily fight competitions, openly challenging Chinese fighters. Many Chinese warriors, including prisoners-of-war from various nations, are killed in the arena and photographic evidence spread across the country as propaganda to crush the Chinese spirit. The Temple of Hades begins buying children again, training them to become assassins against their fellow Chinese.To rescue the children, Vajrasattva enters the Temple and challenges their fiercest Hade

programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: All Together Now
programme.desc: When Vik and Mai want to start a band, Oto is reluctant to join. But with a little Yoko magic, Oto finds out that music is all around him!

programme.title: Jumping Spider
programme.desc: Bouncing beetles or leaping ladybugs. You can make any jumping insect you like. We'll show you how to make a spider with serious spring!

programme.title: When Nerves Attack
programme.desc: Luke has an attack of nerves at the English Trampoline Championships. Kashvi and Pelagia's rhythmic team set their sights on gold, and Dom Cunningham takes on an arm-popping challenge!

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 2: The Big Ones
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their search for the Big Seven wild animals in Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa. They discover ancient rock art in caves and experience exciting moments with a large herd of elephants.

programme.title: Old Luggage
programme.desc: Packed with fun DIYs, Hepi and Briko take us on an adventure!

programme.title: Mine Killing Drone
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents artistic globes of the world, health devices made from toys, a drone that finds and clears landmines, and a man building mansions in trees.

programme.title: Brain Gain
programme.desc: The principal warns: fail the next exam, and you're out. Everyone worries about Flippy. Carol wants to tutor him, Robbie plans to steal the test, Naomi suggests a nerd disguise, Jessi bakes brain cookies, and Motor builds a genius cap-but smart Flippy isn't so nice!

programme.title: Naomi's Birthday
programme.desc: Naomi's birthday is coming, and she's planned it all-including the pricey gift her friends must buy. To afford it, Albert writes homework, Carol babysits, Flippy dances, and Robbie... borrows from Naomi! But will the gift-and the party-be all she hoped for?

programme.title: The Filth
programme.desc: Sir Howler is expecting a visit from the king any second! Only problem is, the town where he lives is a total garbage dump! So the Little Urchins get to work to make the place look spic and span, demonstrating the spectrum of medieval cleaning techniques.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: All for One, and One For All
programme.desc: Each of the kids wants to play a different game, but when the competition gets too fierce, they must use teamwork to play together.

programme.title: Jumping Spider
programme.desc: Bouncing beetles or leaping ladybugs. You can make any jumping insect you like. We'll show you how to make a spider with serious spring!

programme.title: Mouth v Knee
programme.desc: The doctors investigate which part of the body heals the fastest, the mouth or the knee. And in the emergency department, Sophie has a screw in her foot!

programme.title: The First Time In Forever
programme.desc: Hot off her amazing success at the Junior European Championships, artistic gymnast Amelie has been selected for the European Championships, where she will be competing as part of the senior female team.

programme.title: On Duty
programme.desc: Today Robyn and Bonte are helping a puppy with a worrying infection while Nyatepe is examining Jack, the nervous horse. And Jamie and Josh become zoo vets for the day.

programme.title: A Bright Future
programme.desc: Three adorable puppies get rescued from a house fire. Scarlett, the rotund mum of a family of Pomeranians, gets a pedicure before heading off to foster care. And feline brothers - Bill and Ben - are ready to find a forever home.

programme.title: Going Off Grid
programme.desc: By using gridlines, an object can be scaled up (magnified) or scaled down (shrunk). In this episode mathemagician Eric shows how to draw a picture of yourself that's completely to scale - even if the original is teeny tiny!

programme.title: Jumping Spider
programme.desc: Bouncing beetles or leaping ladybugs. You can make any jumping insect you like. We'll show you how to make a spider with serious spring!

programme.title: E11 - Orange Is Not My Color
programme.desc: A man was arrested for stealing high-end perfumes from a major retailer, and an aspiring mortician struggles to make bail so she can get out for her daughter's homecoming dance.

programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect might have acted in self-defence.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E321
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E1 - Australia
programme.desc: Scan the Australian skies, which regularly deliver some of the world’s most volatile weather. Await cooling monsoon rains, watch lightning ignite vast wildfires, and marvel at the ingenious adaptations that help wildlife deal with these extremes.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E1 - Australia
programme.desc: Scan the Australian skies, which regularly deliver some of the world’s most volatile weather. Await cooling monsoon rains, watch lightning ignite vast wildfires, and marvel at the ingenious adaptations that help wildlife deal with these extremes.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E10 - Episode 10
programme.desc: Meet a flock of cedar waxwings who have taken over the center’s aviary and are keeping the staff busy with endless demands for food. Then the rescue team works with the Ministry of Natural Resources to relocate a coyote that’s too people-friendly.

programme.title: E3 - Madagascar in Cold Blood
programme.desc: Explore the lives of Madagascar’s cold-blooded creatures. Chameleons, frog, lizards, and snakes have all adapted in order to survive on the island. We take a look at how they find food, reproduce, and avoid predators.

programme.title: E7 - Cambodia: Hidden Refuges
programme.desc: Bisected by the Mekong’s mighty waters, Cambodia is defined by its relationship to this great river. See why the country is a biodiversity hot spot and explore the secret refuges of animal populations that survive in its untouched natural habitats.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

E213 - The Getaway / Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. // When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: E207 - Endless Summer
programme.desc: Max pretends to turn evil to infiltrate Mastermind's henchmen and steal the Chip-Chucker, a device that previously turned him evil.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E126 - Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E112 - #BabysittingCommercial
programme.desc: To boost their babysitting business, Sam and Cat make a commercial that features Dice's beloved dog. A family recognizes the dog and seeks legal ownership, claiming the dog belongs to them.

programme.title: E208 - The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: E225 - The Crying Dame / Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. // Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

programme.title: E422 - A Star is Scorned / Senior Moment
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E106 - Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: E5 - Restaurant Wars Part 2
programme.desc: The mayhem and drama continues of the biggest Restaurant Wars in the history of “Top Chef.” Tom’s announcement of a double elimination piles on even more pressure. “Top Chef” alum turned James Beard Award winning Chefs Karen Akunowicz and Nina Compton join the restaurant crawl along with Nilou Motamed and guest judge and James Beard Award winning restaurateur, Caroline Styne.

programme.title: Hotel For Dogs
programme.desc: A teen secretly fills a vacant house with stray dogs after she moves in with her fastidious aunt and has to leave her dog behind.

programme.title: E13 - Abby Taps Into Kindness
programme.desc: Abby sees Nina and Charlie tap dancing and decides she wants to learn too!

programme.title: E1 - Dreams And Nightmares
programme.desc: Will Smith, a talented West Philadelphia teenager, is sent to live with family in Bel-Air; upon his arrival, he quickly discovers how different things are and that this is his chance at a new beginning.

programme.title: E10 - Spotted Bear Stretch
programme.desc: Oscar and Susie weather the spotted bear stretch together.

programme.title: E14 - Light As A Feather
programme.desc: Hedgehog attends a spooky coven sleepover.

programme.title: E17 - Glow Worm
programme.desc: Shark helps Oscar visit his past to learn something interesting about himself.

programme.title: E4 - Susie And Ramona Chapter 4: Witches In The City
programme.desc: Ramona sends Susie back to New York in search of new magical creatures.

programme.title: E6 - Yeti Confetti Chapter 2: The Yum Whisperer
programme.desc: Lucy and a young yeti named Fife argue about the right way to raise a litter of baby yetis they found.

programme.title: Hotel For Dogs
programme.desc: A teen secretly fills a vacant house with stray dogs after she moves in with her fastidious aunt and has to leave her dog behind.

programme.title: E6 - Roaring Munchies
programme.desc: The chefs walk in on an epic battle of Last Chance Kitchen and are drafted into the fight. Once Tom declares a winner, the chefs immediately begin a challenge making dishes based on Prohibition Era cocktails. Chef Ken Oringer joins Padma, Tom and Graham at a Roaring 20’s party with Flappers and Dapper Dans.

programme.title: E15 - Jake's Day Off
programme.desc: A worrying Adam is persuaded to join Jake and the two 'borrow' Pixiefrog's scooter to take for a spin.

programme.title: E19 - Have Yourself A Joyful Little Animas
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year, meaning it's time for the annual multi-day animal holiday, ANIMAS.

programme.desc: Ramona sends Susie back to New York in search of new magical creatures.

programme.title: E5 - Got You Covered
programme.desc: Massive structures with retractable walls and roof panels are being used to provide permanent protection for high-value crops. The sheds are a game-changer for fruit and vegetable growers, as Landline reported in 2017.

programme.title: E7 - The Other Disruptor - USA
programme.desc: When a young Muslim American who called himself a democratic socialist was elected Mayor of New York City the world took notice. Zohran Mamdani is America's new political star with an agenda to make his city affordable again.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: E3 - My Body, Your Baby
programme.desc: How far would you go to start your own family? Siobhan Marin meets Australians turning to surrogacy, despite huge costs and risks, and discovers why some women call it empowering, while others warn it's exploitation.

programme.title: E3 - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 3) Burning Hill
programme.desc: In 1959 travel was getting faster and many expected we'd be routinely zipping to other planets in no time. But now, our transport is not much faster than it was back then, so why are we still so slow? (Part 3 of 4)

programme.title: E3 - Spies In The Outback - The Women Get Wild
programme.desc: Nuclear fear prompts thousands to flood to Alice Springs in the 1980s to try and close Pine Gap and reveal its secrets. Women especially don't want Australia involved in nuclear war and the protests turn wild.

programme.title: E4 - Guitars
programme.desc: Dr Karl visits a guitar factory to see how Australia's favourite instrument is made. Precision machines and master craftspeople work in harmony to cut, shape, bend, sand, brace, glue, paint and coax a guitar into existence.

programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E11 - With Fanny Jandrain
programme.desc: On the menu: warm salad of skate wings with red beans and a chicken and mozzarella cordon bleu.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E20 - Var Special Programme
programme.desc: Hugo Guinet, organic market gardener and chicken farmer, sells his produce direct to consumers. All about truffle-hunting with the truffle grower Philippe de Santis, who offers his precious tubers at the market in Aups. The plant life of the Massif des Maures and underwater biodiversity of the Le Brusc lagoon.

programme.title: E3 - Savoie: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Whether summer or winter, Savoie is always a land of excellence. We meet Fombonne-Rouvier, town planner; Rene and Maxime Meilleur, chefs at a three Michelin-starred restaurant; Klebert Silvestre, bee-keeper, Nicolas Mathieu, crozet-producer and mountain guide; Pascale Vidonne, in charge of heritage in Bourg-Saint-Maurice, notably responsible for its Baroque chapels.

programme.title: E34 - La Motte - Mez-Le-Marechal
programme.desc: The La Motte castle, in Chateaurenard, once ruled by Marguerite de Maleissye, has stood the test of time. After serving as a hospital during the war, it is now privately owned. In ruins, the Mez-le-Marechal castle has been abandoned for centuries. But its new owner has decided to give it a new life.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E5 - Special Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Direction for to visit Rodin's home and studio. Ceramic artist Gregoire Scalabre sculpts and accumulates to enter another dimension, between tiny and gigantic. The John Galliano show for Maison Margiela: a journey through time and the strange. Artist Amandine Antunes masters the stucco marble technique.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: E2 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Modern Painting
programme.desc: The collections at the Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum also include works by some of the greatest modern painters, such as: Monet, Morisot, Van Gogh, Gauguin, Derain, van Dongen, Cezanne, Braque, Kandinsky...

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E2 - Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day in the life of JJ & his friends! First, Ms. Appleberry takes the Melon Patch kids on a beach field trip to learn about different types of vehicles. Then, JJ gets to bring a special guest to class: his dog, Bingo! Everyone has a great time as Bingo plays, snacks & even saves the day! The adventure continues at the farm, where JJ & Grandpa have to wrangle all the baby animals after they escape from their pen!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Go Outside & Play with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's go outside & play with JJ! First, JJ & his friends gather all the pillows they can find to build a giant, cozy fort in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as JJ's family rolls into a campsite for a big family vacation in their cool camper van! Then, join JJ & his grandparents for a fun-filled day at the train park. From taking care of Bingo to having a scavenger hunt at the beach with Cody, there are so many ways to play outside!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: With a revenge-thirsty assassin hot on their heels, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew come together as a team to protect their own.

programme.title: XXX: Return Of Xander Cage
programme.desc: When a group of lethal mercenaries steal a weapon that pose a global threat, superspy Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of adrenaline junkies to save the day.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: With a revenge-thirsty assassin hot on their heels, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew come together as a team to protect their own.

programme.title: E19 - Smoked Ham Hock Galumpkis
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: With the construction in full swing, the celebrity directors make a surprise visit to the site. But when they arrive, they find only the skeleton of Shin Dong's team's empty house.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: E12 - Food To Die For
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: E12 - Food To Die For
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: E10 - A Fair-Ly Crazy Cake
programme.desc: Buddy and the team embark on an enormous cake for the Meadowlands State Fair during the same week that a giant retailer tests Buddy's ability to produce 90,000 cakes per month for their nationwide stores!

programme.title: E66 - Orlando: Sweetbriar
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time?

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E240 - The Top Ten Hidden Alien Bases
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten locations that might be hiding alien bases. Are these locations proof that extraterrestrials are not only visiting our planet... but are hiding in plain sight?

programme.title: E4 - Triangle Of Madness
programme.desc: The team thinks a 300-foot wreck off the tip of Florida just might be the Sudoffco-a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: E12 - Beat The Judges: Shamshir Showdown
programme.desc: In this final 'Beat the Judges' competition, two former Forged in Fire champions duel it out in a 5-hour round making a pichangatti to earn the right to go head-to-head with one of our formidable judges.

programme.title: E229 - The New Ufo Hunters

programme.desc: In the late 1800s Americans rarely bathed, lived in filthy conditions and deadly diseases were commonplace. But James Gamble and Harley Procter invent a revolutionary new soap that revolutionises America.

programme.desc: Santa calls it quits so the Titans must pitch in to save the holiday.

programme.title: E5 - His Life As A Dog
programme.desc: An inferior set of Battle Day Zero cards is mysteriously released as a giveaway by a potato chip company. Hiro is on the case but the boys are distracted by the arrival of a giant devil baby Sweet Potato.

programme.title: E407 - Tuzki The Intern/Abduction/Wrong Date
programme.desc: Tuzki is back as the new intern at the lab & he has a new mission - to capture Lamput! How can he do that to his friend?

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

The Diary Of A Big Man
programme.desc: In this delightful screwball comedy, Chow Yun Fat plays a stock broker who met 2 women of his dream on the same night - boutique owner Joey (Joey Wang) and air stewardess Sally (Sally Yeh). Unable to say no to either one, he ended up marrying them both, one in New York and the other in Paris. When the wives befriended each other, he solicited the help from his buddy Hung (Waise Lee) to get him out of each tight spot.

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
programme.desc: News reporter Bill and his wife live in a public housing flat with their 3 daughters. Their dream is to get rich someday. When Lady Luck comes knocking on their door one day and they win the first prize of the local lottery, Mark Six, all hell break loose...

programme.title: Gimme, Gimme
programme.desc: Lobo and Skid are very close friends. They study in the same class, and they both grow up without their mothers. The two buddies often play in a band and play skateboards with their classmates. Soda, one of their classmates, has many girlfriends concurrently, and Suki is his closet girlfriend. Fion is another classmate. She is addicted to chat in phone with friends and strangers every day. She always thinks she will find a true love from playing line. One day, she has an argument with her boyfriend on street, and Pat, an innocent girl, saw the incident...
